mapper.select: SELECT n.SERIAL_NUMBER AS serialNumber, n.REG_USER_CD AS regUserCd, u.USER_NM AS userNm, n.SUBJECT AS subject, n.REG_DATE AS regDate, n.REG_START_DATE AS regStartDate, n.REG_END_DATE AS regEndDate, n.SUBJECT_DETAIL AS subjectDetail, n.FILE_NM AS fileNm, n.FILE_URL AS fileUrl FROM mhdb.TB_COMMON_NOTICE n LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_USER_INFO u ON (n.REG_USER_CD = u.USER_CD) WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY n.SERIAL_NUMBER DESC
SELECT LPAD( (COALESCE(MAX(RIGHT(CAST(SERIAL_NUMBER AS VARCHAR), 3)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 3, '0' ) FROM mhdb.TB_COMMON_NOTICE WHERE CAST(SERIAL_NUMBER AS VARCHAR) LIKE #{regDate} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_COMMON_NOTICE ( SERIAL_NUMBER, REG_USER_CD, SUBJECT, REG_DATE, REG_START_DATE, REG_END_DATE, SUBJECT_DETAIL, FILE_NM, FILE_URL ) VALUES ( #{serialNumber}, #{regUserCd}, #{subject}, #{regDate}, #{regStartDate}, #{regEndDate}, #{subjectDetail}, #{fileNm}, #{fileUrl} )
INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_NOTICE_DAY (USER_CD, CHK_DATE, CHK_YN) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{chkDate}, 'Y')
